prompt: A photorealistic full-length mirror selfie of a slim young woman standing indoors in a warm, upscale apartment living room hallway. She is wearing a fitted ivory-white one-shoulder bodycon midi dress with soft ruched gathering through the waist and hips, elegant minimal styling, and a sleek date-night look. Her hair is straight, dark brown, shoulder length, parted near the center, falling naturally over both sides. She holds a smartphone up in her right hand, partially covering her face, with a black phone case decorated with red cloud motifs. Her left arm rests naturally at her side, with a silver bangle bracelet and delicate rings visible. The composition is vertical, realistic, and casually luxurious, like a genuine personal outfit selfie taken in a wall mirror. The setting includes 1 beige fabric sofa on the right, 1 patterned throw pillow in taupe and cream on the sofa, and 1 small brown leather top-handle handbag placed on the seat cushion. Behind her is a textured bronze-brown accent wall; on the left is a dim hallway with 3 framed wall artworks, dark doorways, cream walls, and polished light tile floors. Use warm indoor ambient lighting, soft shadows, subtle phone-camera realism, natural skin texture, realistic reflections, clean apartment styling, centered subject with the upper body and dress as the focus, and an understated luxury aesthetic.
